Hero.name: Mohammad Hajeer
Hero.title: Software Engineer · Full-Stack Web Developer · CS Graduate
Hero.intro: I build scalable web applications from the ground up — clean APIs, performant frontends, and solid infrastructure. Turning ideas into production-ready products with precision.

About.heading: Building things that matter
paragraphs: Computer Science graduate with a strong foundation in algorithms, systems design, and software engineering principles. I specialize in crafting end-to-end web solutions that balance technical rigor with clean UX.
Whether architecting a database schema or fine-tuning a React component, I care about the craft at every layer of the stack.

items.title: ASL Learning & Translation Platform
items.desc: Built full-stack platform with Laravel and React (TS), implementing multi-role RBAC; integrated MediaPipe ASL translator with responsive UI; built gamified dashboard with points, PDF certs, and real-time chat using Pusher & MUI Charts.

items.title: Quran Progress Tracker
items.desc: Built full-stack Quran memorization tracker with Next.js and Appwrite, featuring multi-role RBAC; daily memorization & revision tracker with history and interactive charts using shadcn/ui; teacher dashboard for viewing students’ progress and notifications.

items.title: Smart Attendance System (IoT-based)
items.desc: Built IoT attendance system using Arduino IDE & ESP8266 with React frontend and Node.js backend; developed backend API with Node.js and SQLite to store/manage student attendance records; implemented real-time tracking via WebSockets.

items.title: RestoManager
items.desc: A full-stack restaurant management and food-ordering platform connecting customers, restaurant owners, and administrators.
items.details: RestoManager is a MERN Stack platform where restaurant owners can register their businesses, manage restaurant profiles, opening hours, categories, menu items, and customer orders. Customers can explore approved restaurants, browse menus, customize items, manage their cart, and track their orders. Administrators review restaurant applications and manage restaurant statuses.
features: Multi-role authentication and authorization for customers, restaurant owners, and administrators
Restaurant registration with logo, banner, and verification document uploads
Admin restaurant approval, rejection, suspension, and status management
Owner dashboard for managing restaurant information, opening hours, categories, and menu items
Public restaurant discovery with search and filtering
Kitchen order management with drag-and-drop status updates
Responsive user interface for desktop and mobile
Server-state caching and synchronization using TanStack Query
Form validation using React Hook Form and Zod

images.alt: RestoManager landing page showing customer discovery, owner workspace, and administrator review interfaces
RestoManager four-step restaurant partner registration form
RestoManager administrator restaurant review screen with verification document preview
RestoManager administrator overview dashboard with restaurant, customer, and order metrics
RestoManager kitchen live view with draggable columns for new, preparing, and ready orders
